# Sunflo Detailing
> Premium auto detailing, ceramic coatings, paint correction, PPF, window tinting, and vinyl wraps in Oakland Park, FL. Est. 2017.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Sunflo Detailing
- **Address:** 4708 NE 11th Ave, Oakland Park, FL 33334
- **Phone:** (954) 235-6882
- **Email:** sunflodetailing@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Founded:** 2017
- **Service Area:** Oakland Park, Fort Lauderdale, Wilton Manors, Pompano Beach, Lighthouse Point, Lauderdale-by-the-Sea, Deerfield Beach

## Services & Pricing

All prices are tiered by vehicle size: Small / Medium / Large.

### Core Packages

**Full Detail (Interior)**
- Prices: $300 / $350 / $400
- Includes: Steam clean entire interior, deep clean dash & door panels, condition center console, clean all glass, deep clean seats, thorough vacuum

**Gloss Enhancement Package**
- Prices: $800 / $900 / $1,000
- Includes: Paint decontamination, clay bar, wheels & wheel wells deep cleaned, gloss enhancement, entry-level ceramic coating

**Paint Enhancement Package**
- Prices: $1,600 / $1,800 / $2,000
- Includes: All Gloss Enhancement steps, pro-level ceramic coating, paint enhancement polish

**Paint Correction** (our flagship)
- Prices: $2,000 / $2,500 / $3,000
- Includes: Multi-stage paint correction (removes 95% of scratches/swirls), pro-level ceramic coating (2 layers)

### Specialty Packages (by quote)

- **Lease Return Package** — Restore interior and address exterior blemishes before inspection
- **New Vehicle Protection** — Decontamination, ceramic coating, fabric/leather protection, optional PPF/tint
- **Boat & RV Detailing** — Salt-safe wash, oxidation removal, marine-grade ceramic or wax

### À La Carte Services (by quote)

- **Paint Protection Film (PPF)** — Invisible urethane film; self-healing; 10-year warranty available
- **Window Tinting** — Up to 99% UV rejection; Florida-legal; carbon and ceramic films available
- **Vinyl Wraps** — Full color change, chrome delete, partial wraps; fully reversible

## Frequently Asked Questions (Top 5)

**How long does a ceramic coating take?**
Depending on the package: Gloss Enhancement is 1 day; Paint Enhancement is 1–2 days; Paint Correction with ceramic takes 2–3 days.

**What's the difference between ceramic coating and wax?**
Wax sits on top of the paint and wears off in weeks. Ceramic coating chemically bonds to the clear coat and lasts 1–5 years, providing hydrophobicity, UV protection, and light scratch resistance.

**Does Sunflo offer mobile detailing?**
No — all services are performed at our Oakland Park shop at 4708 NE 11th Ave. We provide a climate-controlled environment for consistent, high-quality results.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
Cash, all major credit cards, Zelle, Venmo, and CashApp.

**Do I need an appointment?**
Yes — by appointment only. Book via our contact form at sunflodetailing.com/contact or call (954) 235-6882.
